# Find Coloring Pages

> Free printable coloring pages for kids and adults at findcoloringpages.com.
> Every page is free to download and print — no account, no email, no paywall.

## About

Find Coloring Pages offers high-quality printable coloring sheets organized by subject and difficulty level (easy, medium, hard). Pages are PNG files formatted for standard 8.5×11 inch paper, suitable for home printers. All pages are free for personal and classroom use.

## Content

- Coloring pages organized by subject (animals, holidays, characters, and more)
- Each page labeled with difficulty: easy, medium, or hard
- PNG downloads, print-ready on standard 8.5×11 paper
- Blog with tips, activity ideas, and coloring guides

## Available subjects

- /coloring-pages/axolotl — Axolotl coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/baby-lamb — Baby lamb coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/bunny — Bunny coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/clown — Clown coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/dragon — Dragon coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/duck — Duck coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/easter — Easter coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/flowers — Flower coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/lioness — Lioness coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/palm-trees — Palm tree coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/penguin — Penguin coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/police — Police coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/pug — Pug coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/puppy — Puppy coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/soccer — Soccer coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/starfish — Starfish coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/t-rex — T-Rex coloring pages
- /coloring-pages/unicorn — Unicorn coloring pages

## Key URLs

- https://findcoloringpages.com/ — Homepage with full browse grid
- https://findcoloringpages.com/coloring-pages — All subjects
- https://findcoloringpages.com/blog — Blog posts and tips
- https://findcoloringpages.com/rss.xml — RSS feed
- https://findcoloringpages.com/sitemap-index.xml — Full sitemap
